rationale: The cited paper appears in a single grouped parenthetical citation when the authors justify using an error-correction specification, listed alongside several other marketing applications. The citing paper does not discuss Fok et al. (2006) separately, does not rely on its specific hierarchical Bayes ECM setup, and does not build hypotheses or interpretations directly on that study. Its role is therefore general methodological background rather than a distinct, paper-specific influence.
